title: Frog Hill View Point
tagline: Frog Hill View Point — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Frog Hill View Point, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Frog Hill View Point (also Valley View Point) is a tourist spot above Gudalur, Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Frog Hill View Point (also Valley View Point) is a tourist spot above Gudalur, Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is about 12 km (7.5 mi) from Gudalur on NH 181 from Ooty to Gudalur.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Gudalur, Nilgiris
topPlaces.description: Gudalur is a town in Nilgiris district in the India state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Gudalur block
topPlaces.description: The Gudalur block is a revenue block in the Nilgiris District of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 5 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Gudalur division
topPlaces.description: Gudalur division is a revenue division in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the three revenue divisions of Nilgiris District, and includes two talukas, Gudalur and Pandhalur.

topPlaces.name: Chembakolli
topPlaces.description: Chembakolli is a village in the south of India, in the Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu. It is located in the Nilgiri Hills.

topPlaces.name: Gudalur taluk
topPlaces.description: Gudalur taluk is a taluk of Nilgiris district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Gudalur.

topPlaces.name: Naduvattam, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Naduvattam is a Panchayat town in The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on Coimbatore-Gundalpet National Highway NH 67 of the Nilgiri Ghat Roads.

topPlaces.name: O' Valley
topPlaces.description: O' Valley or Ouchterlony Valley is a Town Panchayat in the Gudalur Taluk of The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The name is a contraction of an older name after a James Ouchterlony, who established coffee plantations in the area.

topPlaces.name: Manavayal
topPlaces.description: Manavayal is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Gudalur is a town in Nilgiris district in the India state of Tamil Nadu.
The Gudalur block is a revenue block in the Nilgiris District of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 5 panchayat villages.
Gudalur division is a revenue division in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the three revenue divisions of Nilgiris District, and includes two talukas, Gudalur and Pandhalur.
Chembakolli is a village in the south of India, in the Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu. It is located in the Nilgiri Hills.
Gudalur taluk is a taluk of Nilgiris district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Gudalur.
Naduvattam is a Panchayat town in The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on Coimbatore-Gundalpet National Highway NH 67 of the Nilgiri Ghat Roads.

O' Valley or Ouchterlony Valley is a Town Panchayat in the Gudalur Taluk of The Nilgiris district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The name is a contraction of an older name after a James Ouchterlony, who established coffee plantations in the area.
Manavayal is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Frog Hill View Point?
faq.a: The best time to visit Frog Hill View Point is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Frog Hill View Point?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (74 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Frog Hill View Point?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Frog Hill View Point at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Frog Hill View Point?
faq.a: Stays in Frog Hill View Point start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Frog Hill View Point?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gudalur, Nilgiris, Gudalur block, Gudalur division, Chembakolli, Gudalur taluk.
